title: Sealing
wikitext:
[[File:Sealing.jpg|frame|center|[[Master Roshi]] attempting to seal [[King Piccolo]] into a rice cooker]]

==Summary==
'''Sealing''' is the ability to confine/place something within something else acting as a containment vessel. This process is usually marked by violating the laws of physics, e.g. if an object is sealed within another object, the container does not need to be larger than the contained item. Thus, in some instances, the power may be similar to [[Dimensional Storage]].

The mechanism behind Sealing varies greatly from fiction to fiction, typically involving [[Magic|magic]], though sufficiently advanced science is also frequently used. Sealing as a power is not confined to inanimate objects for either the sealed or the container; living beings, [[Soul Manipulation|souls]], attributes of things and even [[Conceptual Manipulation|concepts]] can be sealed, or used as containers.

Due to its nature as a power, Sealing typically [[Durability Negation|bypasses conventional durability]]. However, most methods of Sealing usually have other built-in limitations unique to their own verse.

==Users==
*[[Zelda (Breath of the Wild)|Zelda]] ([[The Legend of Zelda|The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild]])
*[[Danny Phantom]] ([[Danny Phantom (The Universe)|Danny Phantom]])
*[[Radagon of the Golden Order|Radagon]] ([[Elden Ring]])
*[[Doctor Strange (Marvel Cinematic Universe)|Doctor Strange]] ([[Marvel Cinematic Universe]])
*[[Bigby]] ([[Dungeons and Dragons]])
